title: Remove Argent Script and Mirexa AI Chat entries
author: withthatway

gist.headline: Pruning the garden
gist.blurb: We've done a little housekeeping in the community showcase, pruning a couple of older app entries to keep the list fresh.
gist.summary: Removed Argent Script and Mirexa AI Chat from the community applications list.
gist.impact: The community showcase is slightly more streamlined and up-to-date.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot doing some light gardening or pruning of a digital plant. A cozy garden shed vibe representing list maintenance.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, gently pruning a glowing digital code-plant in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, gently pruning a glowing digital code-plant in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot.
